title: MFA Not Enforced on Admin Accounts
description: Multi-factor authentication has not been enabled on 8 of 12 privileged admin accounts. Exploitation could lead to full domain compromise.

title: No EDR Solution Deployed
description: Endpoint Detection and Response solution not deployed. Ransomware or APT activity would go undetected on endpoints.

title: Vendor Risk Assessments Not Performed
description: Third-party vendors granted network access without security questionnaire or contractual security requirements.

title: No SIEM or Centralized Log Monitoring
description: No centralized SIEM. Security events from firewalls and servers not correlated. Detection capability is severely limited.

title: Legacy Systems Unpatched Beyond 90 Days
description: 17 legacy servers running Windows Server 2012 with no patches applied in over 90 days. Exploitable via known CVEs.

title: Security Awareness Training Not Conducted
description: Annual security awareness training not completed. Only 23% of employees have completed mandatory training this cycle.

title: No DLP Controls for Data Exfiltration
description: USB ports unrestricted and no DLP email monitoring. High risk of insider data theft remains unmitigated.

title: Password Policy Not Technically Enforced
description: Password complexity rules exist in policy document but Group Policy not configured to enforce them technically.

title: Incident Response Tabletop Exercise Overdue
description: Annual IR tabletop exercise not conducted. IR plan exists but untested. Now closed after Q4 exercise completion.

title: Security Policy Not Formally Approved
description: Draft security policy exists but not approved by Board or Executive team. Non-compliant with ISO 27001 A.5.1.

title: BCP Not Tested or Approved
description: Business Continuity Plan in draft form. No formal DR test conducted. RTO and RPO targets unvalidated.

title: DDoS Protection Configuration Review Required
description: DDoS protection rules review completed and updated. Cloudflare WAF configured and validated.

title: Access Reviews Not Conducted in 12 Months
description: Periodic access reviews for privileged and standard user accounts not performed. Stale accounts accumulating.

title: Backup Restoration Test Due
description: Quarterly backup restoration test completed successfully. AES-256 encryption verified on all backup sets.

title: Data Classification Policy Missing
description: No formal data classification scheme defined. Assets not labelled. Required for GDPR and ISO 27001 compliance.
